  3) Coagulation stage: full_coagulation

- Least advanced: visually indistinguishable
- Control vs treated: no obvious differences; all show similar compact clots with clear supernatant
- CH19 vs CH21: no visible difference
- Overall visual difference: subtle (only minor size/opacity variations that may be within handling variability)

- Control vs treated: All show formed clots with clear supernatant; the main visual variability is within the two control replicates.
- CH19 vs CH21: Very similar—both compact, smooth clots with minimal fibrin rims.
- Overall visual difference across conditions: Subtle.
